### Issue URL (Anti Adblock Script) [https://animevietsub.site/phim/cong-chien-tranh-ss2-a1052/tap-12end-15072.html](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fanimevietsub.site%2Fphim%2Fcong-chien-tranh-ss2-a1052%2Ftap-12end-15072.html) ### Comment > The website detects users using adblockers. Normally the problem is solved by reloading the site. But this time this method didn't work, tried blocking elements that detect adblocker but they seems to nested the main element(the thing user wanted to see) inside the adblock detector so the main element is blocked along side with the detector. > To reproduce this problem, you must either accessing the website using Vietnam IP or answer the verification question for foreign IP, the answers for each questions are: > 1. 20/11 > 2. đồng > 3. 5 > 4. Việt Nam > 5. Bác Hồ > Then try to watch any anime, the warning appears. ### Screenshots

pinned_comment.body:
As 2026 May 20, the anti-adblock and advert issues are fixed. However, AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 users need to await the next update of AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 itself. Users who use other AdGuard product types [^1] need to check that all the subscribed [^2] filters lists are up-to-date.

[^1]: Except AdGuard Content Blocker and AdGuard for iOS free version users. These products do not support WebExtesnion API. So, any scriptlet filter injection cannot be done.
[^2]: Including List-KR filters list classic

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/List-KR/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/List-KR/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/List-KR/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/List-KR/tinyShield/issues).

comment.body:
@ghajini I think OP showed this red text:

`Özel haberlerimizi ve günün öne çıkan gelişmelerini kaçırmamak için BirGün’ün WhatsApp kanalını buraya dokunarak hemen takibe alabilirsiniz.`

Meaning:

`Tap here to follow BirGün’s WhatsApp channel and stay up to date with our exclusive stories and the day’s top news.`

comment.body:
> It seems you did not test the rules, and added them intuitively - they are invalid. 

It just my mistake about missing the sharp symbol 😰  Also, If I can find specific hints like `src` or `href` in child elements, I’ll take those when designing the rule.

There are many rules that use the `#block-\d` format. (search query: [`repo:AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters /#block-\d/`](https://github.com/search?q=repo%3AAdguardTeam%2FAdguardFilters+%2F%23block-%5Cd%2F)) I think it’s fine to keep using this kind of rule format in the meantime.

pinned_comment.body:
As 2026 May 20, the anti-adblock and advert issues are fixed. However, AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 users need to await the next update of AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 itself. Users who use other AdGuard product types [^1] need to check that all the subscribed [^2] filters lists are up-to-date.

[^1]: Except AdGuard Content Blocker and AdGuard for iOS free version users. These products do not support WebExtesnion API. So, any scriptlet filter injection cannot be done.
[^2]: Including List-KR filters list classic

comment.body:
@Alex-302 I’m not sure if I fully understood you correctly, but here is what I think: First of all, as far as we know, the original one seems to be `t.ly/dizipalgiris`. One distinguishing detail is that there still appears to be a Windows application available. (Why? To avoid being affected by the address change i guess.) See:
Screenshot

Previously, this original site had sources like X (Twitter) and Discord, but it looks like they may have been taken down due to violations. Because of that, these sites might now be using alternative methods to stay online. Apart from that, the only consistent thing that remains is the `Dizipal` name itself. It is probably known in a similar way to names like `PirateBay` or `YTS` etc. Because of that recognition, there are many copy or imitation sites using the same name, as we can observe. So in short, it’s very difficult to trace reliable sources, because most users simply search `dizipal` on the Search Engine and end up finding different versions of these sites through search results. I mentioned this before as well. > Can you determine which section of the file corresponds to the website with this numbering? Nope. > It overlaps with dizipal2071.com, which is a different website. We also need to know which section corresponds to that website. It makes sense, because it seems the filter developers assumed that `dizipal + number` refers to a single unified site, so the rules may have been grouped or nested together. This can be seen from cases like: https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/229136 https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/197722#issuecomment-2630367680 https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/pull/202132#issuecomment-2772104326

issue.title: collector-sbanking.shb-pelib.com — False positive in AdGuard DNS
issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

AdGuard DNS

### AdGuard version

AdGuard DNS (public, 94.140.14.14)

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Website or app doesn't work properly

### Which browser(s) do you use?

the problem is with app, not a site

### Which device do you use?

Mobile

### Where is the problem encountered?

https://collector-sbanking.shb-pelib.com

### Ad Blocking

AdGuard Base filter

### Privacy

AdGuard Tracking Protection filter

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

_No response_

### Add your comment and screenshots

`collector-sbanking.shb-pelib.com` is a production API endpoint for **PhishingEyes** — a licensed anti-phishing and fraud detection SDK integrated into banking mobile apps (Android). It is used by **Shinhan Bank (SHB)** in South Korea.

The SDK detects spy apps, remote control abuse, and system fraud on end-user devices. This endpoint receives security telemetry from the SDK — it is not an advertising tracker, analytics collector, or spyware server.

The domain is explicitly listed in `SpywareFilter/sections/tracking_servers_firstparty.txt`:
```
||collector-sbanking.shb-pelib.com^
```

Blocking this domain prevents the SDK from reporting security threats to the bank's backend, directly impacting fraud protection for banking customers.

**Verified**: All other major filtering DNS providers (Quad9, Cloudflare Families, OpenDNS, CleanBrowsing, Yandex Safe, Control D, Comodo Secure) resolve this domain normally. Only AdGuard DNS blocks it.

### Privacy

- [x] I agree to follow this condition

pinned_comment.body:
As 2026 May 20, the anti-adblock and advert issues are fixed. However, AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 users need to await the next update of AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 itself. Users who use other AdGuard product types [^1] need to check that all the subscribed [^2] filters lists are up-to-date.

[^1]: Except AdGuard Content Blocker and AdGuard for iOS free version users. These products do not support WebExtesnion API. So, any scriptlet filter injection cannot be done.
[^2]: Including List-KR filters list classic

pinned_comment.body:
As 2026 May 20, the anti-adblock and advert issues are fixed. However, AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 users need to await the next update of AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 itself. Users who use other AdGuard product types [^1] need to check that all the subscribed [^2] filters lists are up-to-date.

[^1]: Except AdGuard Content Blocker and AdGuard for iOS free version users. These products do not support WebExtesnion API. So, any scriptlet filter injection cannot be done.
[^2]: Including List-KR filters list classic

@@ -672,6 +672,7 @@ armidaleexpress.com.au,bendigoadvertiser.com.au,canberratimes.com.au,centralwest
 ! LINK: AnnoyancesFilter/Popups/sections/antiadblock.txt#general

+peacocktv.com#?#.notification--info:has-text(Please disable your ad blocker)
comment.body:
We usually use `:contains()` instead of `:has-text()`.
`:has-text()` is an alias for `:contains()` (https://github.com/AdguardTeam/ExtendedCss#-pseudo-class-contains) and also works fine but anyway it's converted by filters compiler.
For example - https://github.com/AdguardTeam/FiltersRegistry/blob/master/filters/filter_2_Base/diff.txt#L353
So, I think that it would be better to stick with our syntax.
```suggestion
peacocktv.com#?#.notification--info:contains(Please disable your ad blocker)
```

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Anti Adblock Script) [https://my.avira.com/en/auth/forgot](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmy.avira.com%2Fen%2Fauth%2Fforgot) ### Comment > Guten Morgen sehr geehrte Damen und Herrn, > > nach verschiedentlichen, jedoch vergeblichen Versuchen Sie zu kontaktieren, hoffe ich diesmal durchzukommen. > > Ich bin so recht unglücklich darüber, dass ich automatisch weiter als Ihr Kunde geführt werde. (Siehe unten!) > > Ich bitte Sie freundlich mich aus der Liste Ihrer Kunden zu nehmen und den über PayPal angeforderten Betrag zurückzuüberweisen. > > Sollte ich etwas übersehen haben, was meine vertragliche Bindung angeht, so bitte ich es mir nachzusehen.Somit > > Sollte eine Stornierung des „Abonnements“ von Nöten sein, so ist es hiermit storniert. > > Somit erbitte ich mir eine abschließende Antwort Ihrerseits. > > Vielen Dank! > > MfG Al. Berg > > > > > Wenn die E-Mail nicht korrekt angezeigt wird, klicken Sie bitte hier, um die E-Mail in Ihrem Webbrowser zu öffnen. > Sehr geehrte(r) Alexander Berg, > Wichtige Informationen zu Ihrem Abonnement und Ihrer kürzlich erfolgten Zahlung > Wir haben soeben Ihr Abonnement automatisch verlängert. Nachfolgend finden Sie Ihre Referenznummer. Damit wir Ihnen den schnellsten und effizientesten Service bieten können, geben Sie bei Rückfragen oder anderen Anliegen für den Avira Kundensupport bitte immer Ihre Referenznummer an. > Ihr Avira-Abonnement (Nr. 541565578) ist jetzt aktiv > > > > Zahlungsinformationen > Wir haben Ihre Zahlung per PayPal erhalten.Ihre Einzugsermächtigung bei PayPal für die Avira Holding GmbH ist nun aktiv. > > Ihr Abonnement > Menge Produktname Auslieferung > 1 Avira Optimization Suite > 1 Gerät / Jahresabonnement Lieferung als Download > Ihnen wurde am 19/05/2026 die Gebühr in Höhe von 59.95 EUR / 1 Jahr in Rechnung gestellt. > Ihr Abonnement verlängerte sich am 24/06/2026 um 1 Jahr. > > > Ihre Bestelldokumente > Rechnung - 19.05.2026 > > > Geschäftsbedingungen für Abonnements und die automatische Verlängerung > Verlängerung des Abonnements > Ihr Abonnement verlängert sich automatisch jedes Jahr um ein weiteres Jahr, es sei denn, Sie kündigen die Abonnementverlängerung vor dem Tag, an dem Ihnen die Verlängerung in Rechnung gestellt werden soll, in Ihrem Konto oder indem Sie uns kontaktieren. Klicken Sie in Ihrem Konto auf der Registerkarte zu den Verlängerungseinstellungen neben diesem Abonnement auf "Abonnementverlängerung kündigen" und bestätigen Sie die Kündigung. > Der Verlängerungspreis wird bis zu 35 Tage vor der fälligen Verlängerung des Abonnements berechnet und kann sich ändern. > Kündigung und Rückerstattung > Wir würden es bedauern, Sie als Kunden/in zu verlieren, aber natürlich können Sie Ihren Vertrag innerhalb von 60 Tagen nach Abrechnung kündigen. Weitere Informationen zu Ihrem Recht auf Vertragskündigung und Rückerstattung sowie zu Ausnahmen finden Sie in unserer Kündigungs- und Rückerstattungsrichtlinie. Um Ihren Vertrag zu kündigen oder eine Rückerstattung zu beantragen, klicken Sie hier. > > Support > Fragen zu Produkten und technischer Support > Bitte besuchen Sie für Anfragen die Avira Support-Website. Dort finden Sie FAQs, einfache Anweisungs-(How-to-)Artikel und sofortige Hilfestellungen zu Ihren Fragen. > > Webseite: http://www.avira.com/de/support > > > > > Fragen zur Zahlung und Bestellung > Um den Avira Kunden-Support direkt zu kontaktieren, scrollen Sie bitte bis zum Ende der Seite und klicken Sie auf E-Mail-Support oder Telefon-Support. > Sie können den Avira Kunden-Support telefonisch von Montag bis Freitag erreichen. > > > Sicheres Surfen! > Ihr Avira Team > > > ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/3alnqsbs0l8g80s4w0gssw84soc4s40h22k6wed0xw.jpg?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard Browser Extension v5.4.3.1 MV2 System version: | `Windows 11` Browser: | Edge Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter

**Other:**

**Language-specific:**

AdGuard German filter,
AdGuard Dutch filter,
AdGuard French filter,

AdGuard Chinese filter,
Polish Anti Adblock Filters Filters last update: | 2026-05-21T07:48:47Z Tracking protection: | disabled Browsing Security: | disabled Browsing Security statistics: | disabled ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?scheme_version=4&product_type=ext&product_version=5.4.3.1&system_version=Windows+11&ext.manifest_version=2&browser=edge&regular_filters=1%2C2%2C6%2C8%2C10%2C16%2C216%2C224%2C238&filters_last_update=2026-05-21T07%3A48%3A47Z&browsing_security.enabled=0&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=0&stealth.enabled=0)

issue.title: collector-sbanking.shb-pelib.com — False positive in AdGuard DNS
issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

AdGuard DNS

### AdGuard version

AdGuard DNS (public, 94.140.14.14)

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Website or app doesn't work properly

### Which browser(s) do you use?

the problem is with app, not a site

### Which device do you use?

Mobile

### Where is the problem encountered?

https://collector-sbanking.shb-pelib.com

### Ad Blocking

AdGuard Base filter

### Privacy

AdGuard Tracking Protection filter

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

_No response_

### Add your comment and screenshots

`collector-sbanking.shb-pelib.com` is a production API endpoint for **PhishingEyes** — a licensed anti-phishing and fraud detection SDK integrated into banking mobile apps (Android). It is used by **Shinhan Bank (SHB)** in South Korea.

The SDK detects spy apps, remote control abuse, and system fraud on end-user devices. This endpoint receives security telemetry from the SDK — it is not an advertising tracker, analytics collector, or spyware server.

The domain is explicitly listed in `SpywareFilter/sections/tracking_servers_firstparty.txt`:
```
||collector-sbanking.shb-pelib.com^
```

Blocking this domain prevents the SDK from reporting security threats to the bank's backend, directly impacting fraud protection for banking customers.

**Verified**: All other major filtering DNS providers (Quad9, Cloudflare Families, OpenDNS, CleanBrowsing, Yandex Safe, Control D, Comodo Secure) resolve this domain normally. Only AdGuard DNS blocks it.

### Privacy

- [x] I agree to follow this condition

comment.body: (Screenshot) I removed this line. The existing rule is no longer valid.

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Anti Adblock Script) [https://my.avira.com/en/auth/forgot](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmy.avira.com%2Fen%2Fauth%2Fforgot) ### Comment > Guten Morgen sehr geehrte Damen und Herrn, > > nach verschiedentlichen, jedoch vergeblichen Versuchen Sie zu kontaktieren, hoffe ich diesmal durchzukommen. > > Ich bin so recht unglücklich darüber, dass ich automatisch weiter als Ihr Kunde geführt werde. (Siehe unten!) > > Ich bitte Sie freundlich mich aus der Liste Ihrer Kunden zu nehmen und den über PayPal angeforderten Betrag zurückzuüberweisen. > > Sollte ich etwas übersehen haben, was meine vertragliche Bindung angeht, so bitte ich es mir nachzusehen.Somit > > Sollte eine Stornierung des „Abonnements“ von Nöten sein, so ist es hiermit storniert. > > Somit erbitte ich mir eine abschließende Antwort Ihrerseits. > > Vielen Dank! > > MfG Al. Berg > > > > > Wenn die E-Mail nicht korrekt angezeigt wird, klicken Sie bitte hier, um die E-Mail in Ihrem Webbrowser zu öffnen. > Sehr geehrte(r) Alexander Berg, > Wichtige Informationen zu Ihrem Abonnement und Ihrer kürzlich erfolgten Zahlung > Wir haben soeben Ihr Abonnement automatisch verlängert. Nachfolgend finden Sie Ihre Referenznummer. Damit wir Ihnen den schnellsten und effizientesten Service bieten können, geben Sie bei Rückfragen oder anderen Anliegen für den Avira Kundensupport bitte immer Ihre Referenznummer an. > Ihr Avira-Abonnement (Nr. 541565578) ist jetzt aktiv > > > > Zahlungsinformationen > Wir haben Ihre Zahlung per PayPal erhalten.Ihre Einzugsermächtigung bei PayPal für die Avira Holding GmbH ist nun aktiv. > > Ihr Abonnement > Menge Produktname Auslieferung > 1 Avira Optimization Suite > 1 Gerät / Jahresabonnement Lieferung als Download > Ihnen wurde am 19/05/2026 die Gebühr in Höhe von 59.95 EUR / 1 Jahr in Rechnung gestellt. > Ihr Abonnement verlängerte sich am 24/06/2026 um 1 Jahr. > > > Ihre Bestelldokumente > Rechnung - 19.05.2026 > > > Geschäftsbedingungen für Abonnements und die automatische Verlängerung > Verlängerung des Abonnements > Ihr Abonnement verlängert sich automatisch jedes Jahr um ein weiteres Jahr, es sei denn, Sie kündigen die Abonnementverlängerung vor dem Tag, an dem Ihnen die Verlängerung in Rechnung gestellt werden soll, in Ihrem Konto oder indem Sie uns kontaktieren. Klicken Sie in Ihrem Konto auf der Registerkarte zu den Verlängerungseinstellungen neben diesem Abonnement auf "Abonnementverlängerung kündigen" und bestätigen Sie die Kündigung. > Der Verlängerungspreis wird bis zu 35 Tage vor der fälligen Verlängerung des Abonnements berechnet und kann sich ändern. > Kündigung und Rückerstattung > Wir würden es bedauern, Sie als Kunden/in zu verlieren, aber natürlich können Sie Ihren Vertrag innerhalb von 60 Tagen nach Abrechnung kündigen. Weitere Informationen zu Ihrem Recht auf Vertragskündigung und Rückerstattung sowie zu Ausnahmen finden Sie in unserer Kündigungs- und Rückerstattungsrichtlinie. Um Ihren Vertrag zu kündigen oder eine Rückerstattung zu beantragen, klicken Sie hier. > > Support > Fragen zu Produkten und technischer Support > Bitte besuchen Sie für Anfragen die Avira Support-Website. Dort finden Sie FAQs, einfache Anweisungs-(How-to-)Artikel und sofortige Hilfestellungen zu Ihren Fragen. > > Webseite: http://www.avira.com/de/support > > > > > Fragen zur Zahlung und Bestellung > Um den Avira Kunden-Support direkt zu kontaktieren, scrollen Sie bitte bis zum Ende der Seite und klicken Sie auf E-Mail-Support oder Telefon-Support. > Sie können den Avira Kunden-Support telefonisch von Montag bis Freitag erreichen. > > > Sicheres Surfen! > Ihr Avira Team > > > ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/3alnqsbs0l8g80s4w0gssw84soc4s40h22k6wed0xw.jpg?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard Browser Extension v5.4.3.1 MV2 System version: | `Windows 11` Browser: | Edge Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter

**Other:**
Filter unblocking search ads and self-promotion

**Language-specific:**
AdGuard Russian filter,
AdGuard German filter,
AdGuard Dutch filter,
AdGuard French filter,
Official Polish filters for AdBlock, uBlock Origin & AdGuard,
AdGuard Chinese filter,
Polish Anti Adblock Filters Filters last update: | 2026-05-21T07:48:47Z Tracking protection: | disabled Browsing Security: | disabled Browsing Security statistics: | disabled ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?scheme_version=4&product_type=ext&product_version=5.4.3.1&system_version=Windows+11&ext.manifest_version=2&browser=edge&regular_filters=1%2C2%2C6%2C8%2C10%2C16%2C216%2C224%2C238&filters_last_update=2026-05-21T07%3A48%3A47Z&browsing_security.enabled=0&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=0&stealth.enabled=0)

(Siehe unten!) > > Ich bitte Sie freundlich mich aus der Liste Ihrer Kunden zu nehmen und den über PayPal angeforderten Betrag zurückzuüberweisen. > > Sollte ich etwas übersehen haben, was meine vertragliche Bindung angeht, so bitte ich es mir nachzusehen.Somit > > Sollte eine Stornierung des „Abonnements“ von Nöten sein, so ist es hiermit storniert. > > Somit erbitte ich mir eine abschließende Antwort Ihrerseits. > > Vielen Dank! > > MfG Al. Berg > > > > > Wenn die E-Mail nicht korrekt angezeigt wird, klicken Sie bitte hier, um die E-Mail in Ihrem Webbrowser zu öffnen. > Sehr geehrte(r) Alexander Berg, > Wichtige Informationen zu Ihrem Abonnement und Ihrer kürzlich erfolgten Zahlung > Wir haben soeben Ihr Abonnement automatisch verlängert. Nachfolgend finden Sie Ihre Referenznummer. Damit wir Ihnen den schnellsten und effizientesten Service bieten können, geben Sie bei Rückfragen oder anderen Anliegen für den Avira Kundensupport bitte immer Ihre Referenznummer an. > Ihr Avira-Abonnement (Nr. 541565578) ist jetzt aktiv > > > > Zahlungsinformationen > Wir haben Ihre Zahlung per PayPal erhalten.Ihre Einzugsermächtigung bei PayPal für die Avira Holding GmbH ist nun aktiv. > > Ihr Abonnement > Menge Produktname Auslieferung > 1 Avira Optimization Suite > 1 Gerät / Jahresabonnement Lieferung als Download > Ihnen wurde am 19/05/2026 die Gebühr in Höhe von 59.95 EUR / 1 Jahr in Rechnung gestellt. > Ihr Abonnement verlängerte sich am 24/06/2026 um 1 Jahr. > > > Ihre Bestelldokumente > Rechnung - 19.05.2026 > > > Geschäftsbedingungen für Abonnements und die automatische Verlängerung > Verlängerung des Abonnements > Ihr Abonnement verlängert sich automatisch jedes Jahr um ein weiteres Jahr, es sei denn, Sie kündigen die Abonnementverlängerung vor dem Tag, an dem Ihnen die Verlängerung in Rechnung gestellt werden soll, in Ihrem Konto oder indem Sie uns kontaktieren. Klicken Sie in Ihrem Konto auf der Registerkarte zu den Verlängerungseinstellungen neben diesem Abonnement auf "Abonnementverlängerung kündigen" und bestätigen Sie die Kündigung. > Der Verlängerungspreis wird bis zu 35 Tage vor der fälligen Verlängerung des Abonnements berechnet und kann sich ändern. > Kündigung und Rückerstattung > Wir würden es bedauern, Sie als Kunden/in zu verlieren, aber natürlich können Sie Ihren Vertrag innerhalb von 60 Tagen nach Abrechnung kündigen. Weitere Informationen zu Ihrem Recht auf Vertragskündigung und Rückerstattung sowie zu Ausnahmen finden Sie in unserer Kündigungs- und Rückerstattungsrichtlinie. Um Ihren Vertrag zu kündigen oder eine Rückerstattung zu beantragen, klicken Sie hier. > > Support > Fragen zu Produkten und technischer Support > Bitte besuchen Sie für Anfragen die Avira Support-Website. Dort finden Sie FAQs, einfache Anweisungs-(How-to-)Artikel und sofortige Hilfestellungen zu Ihren Fragen. > > Webseite: http://www.avira.com/de/support > > > > > Fragen zur Zahlung und Bestellung > Um den Avira Kunden-Support direkt zu kontaktieren, scrollen Sie bitte bis zum Ende der Seite und klicken Sie auf E-Mail-Support oder Telefon-Support. > Sie können den Avira Kunden-Support telefonisch von Montag bis Freitag erreichen. > > > Sicheres Surfen! > Ihr Avira Team > > > ### Screenshots

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
[https://www.paramountplus.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.paramountplus.com%2F)

### Comment
> I am using 94.140.14.14 and 94.140.15.15 for DNS on my router and dns.adguard-dns.com on my android phone.  Recently we have starting experiencing issues with the android and streaming device apps for Paramount Plus, though they worked without issue in the past.  I don't use this app regularly, though fairly sure I had used it about 4-6 weeks ago without any issues. I do have an ad free account with Paramount Plus, though they often play an advertisement for their content before a program starts. 
> 
> There's no issue browsing to Paramount Plus via the web and watching videos.  I am also able to navigate the site without issue within the Paramount plus app on the phone or streaming device until I attempt to play a video which then sits at a blank window until eventually failing. If I do not use the AdGuard DNS filter playing video in the Paramount Plus apps works without issue.  If you need any additional information from me, or have anything you would like me to try, feel free to let me know.
> 

```
Username: @TheCarsForever
```

issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

AdGuard Browser Extension

### AdGuard version

5.4.3.1

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Missed ads or ad leftovers

### Which browser(s) do you use?

Chrome

### Which device do you use?

Desktop

### Where is the problem encountered?

https://rutube.ru/video/5c20f4bb14ac431e06016cd0dba2d401/

### Ad Blocking

AdGuard Base filter

### Privacy

_No response_

### Social Widgets

_No response_

### Annoyances

_No response_

### Security

_No response_

### Other

_No response_

### DNS filters

_No response_

### Language-specific

AdGuard Russian filter

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

_No response_

### Add your comment and screenshots

Got rid of the ad with these custom rules — once I added them to the user filter, Rutube preroll/midroll stopped playing while the main video kept working fine:

  ||a.rutube.ru/api/v1/ad^
  ||yast.rutube.ru/gowast/
  ||ssp.rutube.ru^
  ||pic.rutube.ru/ssp/
  ||goya.rutube.ru/v2/adonline/
  ||goya.rutube.ru/v2/banner/

  Before that the ad was breaking through the default filters — Rutube falls back to its own SSP (a.rutube.ru/api/v1/ad returning VAST, pic.rutube.ru/ssp/*.mp4 as the creative) when ADFOX is
   blocked, so the bundled rules didn't catch it.


### Privacy

- [x] I agree to follow this condition

  ||goya.rutube.ru/v2/adonline/
  ||goya.rutube.ru/v2/banner/

   blocked, so the bundled rules didn't catch it.

issue.title: collector-sbanking.shb-pelib.com — False positive in AdGuard DNS
issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

AdGuard DNS

### AdGuard version

AdGuard DNS (public, 94.140.14.14)

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Website or app doesn't work properly

### Which browser(s) do you use?

the problem is with app, not a site

### Which device do you use?

Mobile

### Where is the problem encountered?

https://collector-sbanking.shb-pelib.com

### Ad Blocking

AdGuard Base filter

### Privacy

AdGuard Tracking Protection filter

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

_No response_

### Add your comment and screenshots

`collector-sbanking.shb-pelib.com` is a production API endpoint for **PhishingEyes** — a licensed anti-phishing and fraud detection SDK integrated into banking mobile apps (Android). It is used by **Shinhan Bank (SHB)** in South Korea.

The SDK detects spy apps, remote control abuse, and system fraud on end-user devices. This endpoint receives security telemetry from the SDK — it is not an advertising tracker, analytics collector, or spyware server.

The domain is explicitly listed in `SpywareFilter/sections/tracking_servers_firstparty.txt`:
```
||collector-sbanking.shb-pelib.com^
```

Blocking this domain prevents the SDK from reporting security threats to the bank's backend, directly impacting fraud protection for banking customers.

**Verified**: All other major filtering DNS providers (Quad9, Cloudflare Families, OpenDNS, CleanBrowsing, Yandex Safe, Control D, Comodo Secure) resolve this domain normally. Only AdGuard DNS blocks it.

### Privacy

- [x] I agree to follow this condition

comment.body:
Thank you for the quick review and action.

However, as far as I know, for this change to actually take effect, needs to deploy the updated filtering/server rules of Adguard DNS server. Is that correct?

If so, I would appreciate it if you could also share the deployment schedule or any way for us to verify whether the change has actually been deployed.

As you also confirmed, this is an actively used production domain, and related issues are continuously being reported, so we would like to monitor the status closely.

Please check and let us know.

### Prerequisites - [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml); - [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue; - [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date; - [x] Browser version is up-to-date; - [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue. ### What product do you use? AdGuard for Windows ### AdGuard version AdGuard for Windows v8.0.0 Beta 6 (5436) ### What type of problem have you encountered? Missed ads or ad leftovers ### Which browser(s) do you use? Chrome ### Which device do you use? Desktop ### Where is the problem encountered? https://rclone.org/ ### Ad Blocking AdGuard Base filter ### Annoyances AdGuard Cookie Notices filter, AdGuard Popups filter, AdGuard Mobile App Banners filter, AdGuard Widgets filter, AdGuard Other Annoyances filter ### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled? Block Location API, Hide your search queries, Send Do-Not-Track signals ### Add your comment and screenshots Please close #231697 as I accidentally marked it NSFW and I decided to just do an issue manually. rclone's site recently underwent a lot of changes and it now displays a lot of ads ("sponsors") as well as some annoyances (like the `❤️Sponsor` tab or the neon orange `💼︎For Business` button). In case it's relevant, I'm using the SockFilter option, which has been working great.
Screenshot:
### Privacy - [x] I agree to follow this condition

issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

AdGuard Browser Extension

### AdGuard version

5.4.3.1

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Missed ads or ad leftovers

### Which browser(s) do you use?

Chrome

### Which device do you use?

Desktop

### Where is the problem encountered?

https://rutube.ru/video/5c20f4bb14ac431e06016cd0dba2d401/

### Ad Blocking

AdGuard Base filter

### Privacy

_No response_

### Social Widgets

_No response_

### Annoyances

_No response_

### Security

_No response_

### Other

_No response_

### DNS filters

_No response_

### Language-specific

AdGuard Russian filter

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

_No response_

### Add your comment and screenshots

Got rid of the ad with these custom rules — once I added them to the user filter, Rutube preroll/midroll stopped playing while the main video kept working fine:

  ||a.rutube.ru/api/v1/ad^
  ||yast.rutube.ru/gowast/
  ||ssp.rutube.ru^
  ||pic.rutube.ru/ssp/
  ||goya.rutube.ru/v2/adonline/
  ||goya.rutube.ru/v2/banner/

  Before that the ad was breaking through the default filters — Rutube falls back to its own SSP (a.rutube.ru/api/v1/ad returning VAST, pic.rutube.ru/ssp/*.mp4 as the creative) when ADFOX is
   blocked, so the bundled rules didn't catch it.


### Privacy

- [x] I agree to follow this condition

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 4 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

pinned_comment.body:
As 2026 May 20, the anti-adblock and advert issues are fixed. However, AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 users need to await the next update of AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 itself. Users who use other AdGuard product types [^1] need to check that all the subscribed [^2] filters lists are up-to-date.

[^1]: Except AdGuard Content Blocker and AdGuard for iOS free version users. These products do not support WebExtesnion API. So, any scriptlet filter injection cannot be done.
[^2]: Including List-KR filters list classic

issue.title: collector-sbanking.shb-pelib.com — False positive in AdGuard DNS
issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

AdGuard DNS

### AdGuard version

AdGuard DNS (public, 94.140.14.14)

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Website or app doesn't work properly

### Which browser(s) do you use?

the problem is with app, not a site

### Which device do you use?

Mobile

### Where is the problem encountered?

https://collector-sbanking.shb-pelib.com

### Ad Blocking

AdGuard Base filter

### Privacy

AdGuard Tracking Protection filter

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

_No response_

### Add your comment and screenshots

`collector-sbanking.shb-pelib.com` is a production API endpoint for **PhishingEyes** — a licensed anti-phishing and fraud detection SDK integrated into banking mobile apps (Android). It is used by **Shinhan Bank (SHB)** in South Korea.

The SDK detects spy apps, remote control abuse, and system fraud on end-user devices. This endpoint receives security telemetry from the SDK — it is not an advertising tracker, analytics collector, or spyware server.

The domain is explicitly listed in `SpywareFilter/sections/tracking_servers_firstparty.txt`:
```
||collector-sbanking.shb-pelib.com^
```

Blocking this domain prevents the SDK from reporting security threats to the bank's backend, directly impacting fraud protection for banking customers.

**Verified**: All other major filtering DNS providers (Quad9, Cloudflare Families, OpenDNS, CleanBrowsing, Yandex Safe, Control D, Comodo Secure) resolve this domain normally. Only AdGuard DNS blocks it.

### Privacy

- [x] I agree to follow this condition

comment.body:
Screenshot

Currently, AdGuard DNS (default public server[^1]) does not block the domain. You can check it with [dnslookup tool](https://github.com/ameshkov/dnslookup). > As you also confirmed, this is an actively used production domain, and related issues are continuously being reported, so we would like to monitor the status closely. Do you want to make sure that AdGuard DNS filters list and AdGuard DNS (default public server) do not block the domain by adding the domain into `Filters/exclusions.txt` of https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdGuardSDNSFilter? I already added the domain into AGLint config file [^2] of AdguardFilters repo to prevent a possible addition in the future. [^1]: https://adguard-dns.io/en/public-dns.html [^2]: AGLint is a Linter for adblock filters list like ESLint in Javascript/Typescript and rust-analyzer in Rust language.

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
[https://www.paramountplus.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.paramountplus.com%2F)

### Comment
> I am using 94.140.14.14 and 94.140.15.15 for DNS on my router and dns.adguard-dns.com on my android phone.  Recently we have starting experiencing issues with the android and streaming device apps for Paramount Plus, though they worked without issue in the past.  I don't use this app regularly, though fairly sure I had used it about 4-6 weeks ago without any issues. I do have an ad free account with Paramount Plus, though they often play an advertisement for their content before a program starts. 
> 
> There's no issue browsing to Paramount Plus via the web and watching videos.  I am also able to navigate the site without issue within the Paramount plus app on the phone or streaming device until I attempt to play a video which then sits at a blank window until eventually failing. If I do not use the AdGuard DNS filter playing video in the Paramount Plus apps works without issue.  If you need any additional information from me, or have anything you would like me to try, feel free to let me know.
>

comment.body:
@TheCarsForever Hi, I don't have an account to check this. Do you still have the problem with AdGuard DNS? If so and switching to AdGuard DNS Non-filtering or your ISP's DNS helps, please do the following:
1. Change the DNS settings on your router to the settings provided by your ISP
2. Make sure that watching videos in the app works fine
3. Install [AdGuard for Android](https://adguard.com/adguard-android/overview.html) on your smartphone
4. Leave only DNS module in the app
5. DNS server - set `Automatic DNS`
6. DNS filters - enable AdGuard DNS filter along with user rules
7. Check updates in the main window
8. Reproduce the problem
9. In case you have it, open `recent activity`
10. There you'll see requests, some of them might be blocked (they are highlighted with a red background)
11. Try to unblock them one by one to see which one helps
12. Please let me know the results.

This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 7 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

pinned_comment.body:
As 2026 May 20, the anti-adblock and advert issues are fixed. However, AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 users need to await the next update of AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 itself. Users who use other AdGuard product types [^1] need to check that all the subscribed [^2] filters lists are up-to-date.

[^1]: Except AdGuard Content Blocker and AdGuard for iOS free version users. These products do not support WebExtesnion API. So, any scriptlet filter injection cannot be done.
[^2]: Including List-KR filters list classic

pinned_comment.body:
As 2026 May 20, the anti-adblock and advert issues are fixed. However, AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 users need to await the next update of AdGuard Browser Extension MV3 itself. Users who use other AdGuard product types [^1] need to check that all the subscribed [^2] filters lists are up-to-date.

[^1]: Except AdGuard Content Blocker and AdGuard for iOS free version users. These products do not support WebExtesnion API. So, any scriptlet filter injection cannot be done.
[^2]: Including List-KR filters list classic

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
[https://www.cdu.de/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.cdu.de%2F)

### Comment
> The hosts cdu.de and www.cdu.de are blocked by AdGuard's standard filter:
> 
> > AdGuard DNS blocked access to www.cdu.de because it’s in our database of phishing and malicious domains
> 
> This is the web site of the large German conservative party that's currently leading the government. It is not a phishing domain. The content hosted there is malicious only in ideological ways.

```
Username: @ge0rg
```


### Screenshots
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1</summary>
